title: NewsSource
description: A registered news source in the World Intelligence source registry. At least one of rss_url or api_url must be present.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier. Used as a key in pipeline configs.

name.description: Human-readable display name of the source.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the country where the source is based.

language.description: Primary language of published content. ISO 639-1 code (e.g. 'en', 'zh', 'th').

region_focus.description: Geographic regions this source primarily covers. Free-form strings (e.g. 'Southeast Asia', 'Global', 'Middle East').

source_type.description: Organizational category of the news source.

access_type.description: How the collector will access this source.

rss_url.description: Primary RSS or Atom feed URL. Required if access_type is 'rss' or 'rss_and_api'.

api_url.description: Base API endpoint URL. Required if access_type is 'api' or 'rss_and_api'.

topics.description: Topic domains this source covers. Used by the reporter-agent to route articles.

reliability_tier.description: Editorial reliability rating. 1 = high reliability and editorial independence (wire agencies, established public broadcasters). 2 = generally reliable, may have noted limitations or commercial pressure. 3 = state-affiliated, strong institutional bias, or limited editorial independence.

bias_note.description: Factual, neutral note on the source's known editorial position, ownership, or state affiliation. Not a judgment — context for the reporter-agent.

usage_notes.description: Technical notes for the collector: auth requirements, known quirks, feed freshness, URL stability.

enabled.description: Whether the collector should actively fetch from this source. Set false to pause without removing the entry.
